name: qa-planner
description: Portable QA planning plugin with Plane hybrid support for converting requirements and Plane work items/cards into planning_state JSON, test plans, test cases, coverage maps, Plane sync outputs, review feedback, and downstream handoff contracts.

interface.shortDescription: Create QA plans from requirements or Plane cards.
interface.longDescription: QA Planner provides a portable skill for normalizing requirements and Plane.so work items/cards, analyzing risk and ambiguity, creating planning_state JSON, rendering test plans and test cases from the Template Test Case field model, managing OK/NOK review loops, syncing Plane comments/attachments/wiki pages, optionally moving Plane status after successful sync, and producing handoff contracts for qa-executor, qa-automation, and qa-reporter.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use qa-planner to create a QA planning package from requirements or a Plane work item.
